title: War criminal Ratko Mladić's jail release request denied
snippet: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.

title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
snippet: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

title: Canvas hack: Company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
snippet: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.

title: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
snippet: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

title: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
snippet: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.

title: Motability withdraws compulsory black boxes after criticism from drivers
snippet: Motability says it is pausing its rule changes after drivers said they were confusing and restrictive.

title: UK alcohol deaths fall for first time since Covid pandemic
snippet: Experts say the “modest reduction” is “not cause for complacency”, with calls to redouble efforts to slash deaths further.

title: Woman in bank row over depositing £900 HMRC cheque
snippet: Annabel Yates says she faces a 94 mile round trip to bank a cheque because of changes at Lloyds.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: What is hantavirus and how does it spread?
snippet: The Andes strain of the virus, which can rarely be passed from person to person,  has been found among passengers of a cruise ship.

title: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
snippet: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.

title: King visits victims of Golders Green stabbings
snippet: King Charles III visited a Jewish Care charity centre as well as meeting the wider community affected.

title: James Van Der Beek's widow posts emotional tribute: 'Words just don't capture what grief is'
snippet: The Dawson's Creek actor died in February and his wife, Kimberly, says "the reality is settling in".

title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain
snippet: The leaders of the world's two superpowers were all smiles for the cameras during the US president's visit to Beijing.

title: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC
snippet: Rayner stood down as deputy prime minister in September 2025 after admitting underpaying stamp duty.
